mapper.select: SELECT b.*, c.name as category_name, c.type as category_type, c.icon as category_icon, c.color as category_color FROM bill b LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bill (amount, type, category_id, user_id, date, remark, images, location) VALUES (#{amount}, #{type}, #{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{date}, #{remark}, #{images}, #{location})
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m') as month, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'income' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as income, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'expense' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as expense, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'income' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'expense' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as balance FROM bill WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y') = #{year} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT b.*, c.name as category_name, c.type as category_type, c.icon as category_icon, c.color as category_color FROM bill b LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.date DESC, b.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
